name: Grilling
description_en: Grill the user relentlessly about a plan, decision, or idea to stress-test their thinking — one question at a time down the decision tree — and don't act until shared understanding is confirmed.
description_zh: 就某个方案、决策或想法对用户穷追不舍地逐一提问（沿决策树每次一个问题）以压力测试其思路，并在确认达成共识前不动手。
long_en: One skill from Matt Pocock's skills collection (this entry installs only the skills/productivity/grilling folder, not the whole repo). It walks down each branch of the decision tree one decision at a time, asking a single question per turn and recommending an answer. As of v1.1 it splits facts (which it looks up by exploring the codebase and tools) from decisions (which it puts to you and waits for your answer), and a confirmation gate stops it from acting on the plan until you confirm shared understanding has been reached.
long_zh: Matt Pocock 技能合集中的一个技能（本条目只安装 skills/productivity/grilling 这一个目录，而非整仓）。它沿着决策树逐个分支推进，每轮只问一个问题并给出推荐答案。自 v1.1 起，它把事实(facts)（通过探查代码库与工具自行查明）与决策(decisions)（逐一交给你并等待你的回答）区分开，并设有确认门：在你确认达成共识之前，不会依据该方案动手。
sec_note_en: Pure conversational orchestration: it only drives a question-and-answer interview and makes no external changes (no files written, no commands run, no network access). It is model-invokable, so the agent may trigger it on grill-style phrasing; it may read your codebase to answer questions itself.
sec_note_zh: 纯对话式编排：它只驱动一问一答的访谈，不做任何外部改动（不写文件、不执行命令、不联网）。该技能可被模型自动调用，因此智能体可能在出现“烤问”类措辞时自动触发；它可能会读取你的代码库来自行解答问题。
